rationale:

The `result.json` reports `"outcome": "task_succeeded"` but the merged commit `af88d432` (referenced as `result_rev`) had message "fix(server): drop phantom test-dir projects from state file" — the actual implementation may have been merged already but is not visible in this diff. The review diff only covers `034fbf8f`, which is the evidence commit, not the implementation commit.
